name: ElmWidgets

aliases.name: AutocompleteAttributes
aliases.type: { disabled : Basics.Bool, readOnly : Basics.Bool, placeholder : Maybe.Maybe String.String, onFocus : Maybe.Maybe msg, onBlur : Maybe.Maybe msg, onEnter : Maybe.Maybe msg, htmlAttrs : List.List (Html.Attribute msg) }

aliases.name: CheckboxAttributes
aliases.type: { id : Maybe.Maybe String.String, color : String.String, disabled : Basics.Bool }

aliases.name: DataRowAttributes
aliases.type: { footer : Maybe.Maybe (Html.Html msg), header : Maybe.Maybe (Html.Html msg), left : Maybe.Maybe (Html.Html msg), onClick : Maybe.Maybe msg, href : Maybe.Maybe String.String }

aliases.name: InputAttributes
aliases.type: { id : Maybe.Maybe String.String, disabled : Basics.Bool, readOnly : Basics.Bool, required : Basics.Bool, pattern : Maybe.Maybe String.String, placeholder : Maybe.Maybe String.String, onFocus : Maybe.Maybe msg, onBlur : Maybe.Maybe msg, onEnter : Maybe.Maybe msg, htmlAttrs : List.List (Html.Attribute msg) }

aliases.name: InvisibleButtonAttributes
aliases.type: { id : Maybe.Maybe String.String, color : String.String, background : String.String, disabled : Basics.Bool, fill : Basics.Bool }

aliases.name: OutlinedButtonAttributes
aliases.type: { id : Maybe.Maybe String.String, color : String.String, shadow : String.String, disabled : Basics.Bool, fill : Basics.Bool }

aliases.name: PrimaryButtonAttributes
aliases.type: { id : Maybe.Maybe String.String, color : String.String, background : String.String, shadow : String.String, disabled : Basics.Bool, fill : Basics.Bool }

aliases.name: RadioButtonsAttributes
aliases.type: { id : Maybe.Maybe String.String, color : String.String, disabled : Basics.Bool, vertical : Basics.Bool }

aliases.name: StatusButtonAttributes
aliases.type: { id : Maybe.Maybe String.String, disabled : Basics.Bool, fill : Basics.Bool }

values.name: autocomplete
values.type: List.List (ElmWidgets.AutocompleteAttributes msg -> ElmWidgets.AutocompleteAttributes msg) -> { id : String.String, search : String.String, value : Maybe.Maybe a, options : Maybe.Maybe (List.List a), toLabel : a -> String.String, onInput : String.String -> Maybe.Maybe a -> msg } -> Html.Html msg

values.name: checkbox
values.type: List.List (ElmWidgets.CheckboxAttributes -> ElmWidgets.CheckboxAttributes) -> { value : Basics.Bool, onInput : Basics.Bool -> msg } -> Html.Html msg

values.name: confirmButton
values.type: List.List (ElmWidgets.StatusButtonAttributes -> ElmWidgets.StatusButtonAttributes) -> { label : Html.Html msg, onClick : msg } -> Html.Html msg

values.name: confirmButtonLink
values.type: List.List (ElmWidgets.StatusButtonAttributes -> ElmWidgets.StatusButtonAttributes) -> { label : Html.Html msg, href : String.String } -> Html.Html msg

values.name: dangerButton
values.type: List.List (ElmWidgets.StatusButtonAttributes -> ElmWidgets.StatusButtonAttributes) -> { label : Html.Html msg, onClick : msg } -> Html.Html msg

values.name: dangerButtonLink
values.type: List.List (ElmWidgets.StatusButtonAttributes -> ElmWidgets.StatusButtonAttributes) -> { label : Html.Html msg, href : String.String } -> Html.Html msg

values.name: dataRow
values.type: List.List (ElmWidgets.DataRowAttributes msg -> ElmWidgets.DataRowAttributes msg) -> { label : Html.Html msg, actions : List.List (Html.Html msg) } -> Html.Html msg

values.name: dateInput
values.type: List.List (ElmWidgets.InputAttributes msg -> ElmWidgets.InputAttributes msg) -> { onInput : String.String -> msg, value : String.String } -> Html.Html msg

values.type: Html.Html msg
